name: claude-discipline
description: Claude-Code-first project scaffolds + global hallucination-reduction discipline. Two distribution paths: (1) /plugin install bootstrap@... for an interactive project scaffolder; (2) bash install-global.sh for the universal ~/.claude/ overlay (CLAUDE.md, hooks, commands).

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Two scaffolders: /bootstrap-project for empty dirs + /retrofit-project for existing projects (auto-detects stack, merges discipline additively).
